scenarios.description: sourceRange delegates to non-null parent.sourceRange(key) and returns the parent result (branch parent!=null)
scenarios.precondition: Attributes subclass stub with overriden sourceRange(String) returns a specific AttributeRange instance
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the stubbed AttributeRange instance from parent.sourceRange
pseudocode: TEST TC02 sourceRange delegates to parent
// Arrange: create a stub Attributes with known return
AttributeRange expectedRange = new Range.AttributeRange(/* dummy range */);
